Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.type.motion

Class FlixelMotion

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.FlixelTween
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.type.motion.FlixelMotion
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Pool.Poolable
Direct Known Subclasses:
FlixelCircularMotion, FlixelCubicMotion, FlixelLinearMotion, FlixelLinearPath, FlixelQuadMotion, FlixelQuadPath
public abstract class FlixelMotion extends FlixelTween
Base class for motion tweens that drive an optional FlixelObject position. While active, the target is marked immovable and restored on end.

Subclasses should create a setMotion() method that sets the motion for the tween.

  • Method Details

    • setMotionObject

      public FlixelMotion setMotionObject(@Nullable @Nullable FlixelObject target)
      Binds the object to move; captures and forces immovable for the tween lifetime.
      Parameters:
      target - The object to move.
      Returns:
      this for chaining.

    • getMotionTarget

      @Nullable public @Nullable FlixelObject getMotionTarget()

    • finish

      public void finish()
      Description copied from class: FlixelTween
      Called when the tween reaches the end of its duration.

      Invokes onComplete (including for LOOPING/PINGPONG each cycle). LOOPING/PINGPONG restart (PINGPONG flips direction). Non-looping tweens (ONESHOT, PERSIST, BACKWARD) are deactivated so they stop updating and no longer overwrite the target; only ONESHOT is removed from the manager.

      Overrides:
      finish in class FlixelTween

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Specified by:
      reset in interface com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Pool.Poolable
      Overrides:
      reset in class FlixelTween

    • isTweenOf

      public boolean isTweenOf(Object object, String field)
      Description copied from class: FlixelTween
      Whether this tween is considered to animate object for the given logical field or path. Used by FlixelTweenManager.cancelTweensOf(Object, String...) and related APIs.
      Overrides:
      isTweenOf in class FlixelTween
      Parameters:
      object - The instance to test (e.g. the root passed to cancelTweensOf).
      field - Optional goal key or dotted path (e.g. "x" or "weapon.rotation"); null or empty matches any field on object for types that support it.
      Returns:
      false by default; subclasses override.
